name: aiguard-knowledge
category: Education · IoT Smart Home Eldercare Project Knowledge Assistant
description: 智守AI-Guard教学项目知识助手：提供技术栈文档检索、硬件规格查询（ESP32-S3手表/ESP32-P4中控屏V0.5/V1.0固件）、故障排查引导、敏捷开发与课程协作规则支持。Invoke when students ask about AI-Guard project tech stack, hardware, firmware versions, troubleshooting, setup, Git/Issue workflow, assessment, or development process.
